description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a vibrant and detailed label featuring a large, coiled snake with its mouth open, fangs exposed, and tongue extended. The background is a teal blue with black and orange accents, and the can is covered in bold, stylized text and graphic elements. One side of the can displays the beer's name, 'STRIKE AMERICAN IPA,' in large white letters, while another side features product information, including ABV (5.5%), volume (330ml), and a list of ingredients. The back of the can includes a cartoon pig illustration, social media hashtags, and vegan-friendly labeling. The top of the can is matte black with a standard pull tab. The overall design is modern, eye-catching, and illustrative, with a focus on bold colors and dynamic imagery.
description: A vividly illustrated aluminum beer can featuring a striking snake graphic, bold typography, and teal, orange, and black color scheme. The can is covered in detailed product and branding information.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the snake's head and upper body, with the ABV prominently displayed and a circular logo visible near the top.
description_view_1: This view shows the back of the can, featuring a cartoon pig, social media hashtags, and detailed product information including vegan labeling.
description_view_2: The side view displays the large 'STRIKE AMERICAN IPA' text vertically, along with a list of ingredients and a barcode.
description_view_3: This angle focuses on the snake's open mouth and fangs, with the volume (330ml) clearly visible at the bottom.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, illustrated snake in orange and yellow tones against a teal background, with dynamic splashes and black accents. Typography is large and white, with additional graphic elements such as a cartoon pig and modern, eye-catching layout.
